name: Scenario B: Related but distinct tasks → 2 canonical tasks (different action_type)
description: Two evidence events in the same matter but for different action types: 'filing' vs 'deposition'. They should produce distinct canonical tasks despite the same matter.

evidence_events.raw_text: File the motion to compel in the Johnson matter by March 15.
Schedule the deposition of the expert witness in the Johnson matter for late March.

candidate_tasks.canonical_summary: File motion to compel in Johnson matter
Schedule expert witness deposition in Johnson matter
